Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

B

battlefield - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
BattlefieldView3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view
Full 3D battlefield: both boards (the player's and the machine's) exist in the same scene at all times, placed apart from each other, floating over one continuous "sea" slab, inside a box "sky" made of ordinary walls (not a SubScene fill gradient -- see BattlefieldView3D.createGradientTexture(javafx.scene.paint.Color, javafx.scene.paint.Color, int, int) for why).
BattlefieldView3D(double, double) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Builds both boards, the sea, the sky, the lights, and the camera rig (starting parked over the player's own board), all inside one SubScene.
BattlefieldView3D.Turn - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.view
Whose board the camera should be looking at.
beamAt(double, double, double, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Same beam formula, looked up by X position -- used to glue deck details to the real surface.
beamAt(double, double, double, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
The beam (Z half-width) of a given hull layer at position x, matching exactly the slice that Destroyer3D.buildTaperedLayer(javafx.scene.Group, double, double, double, double, javafx.scene.paint.Color, double, double) would have drawn there -- used so details "stuck" to the hull (like portholes) land right on its real surface instead of floating in space.
beamAtIndex(int, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
beamFactor(double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Beam ramps from minBeam up to maxBeam over the first PLATEAU_FRACTION of the length, then stays flat -- a sharp bow point followed by parallel sides.
board - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
Board - Class in com.example.battleship.model.board
A 10x10 Battleship board: the grid of Cells, the fleet placed on it, and the rules for placing ships and resolving shots.
Board() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Creates an empty 10x10 board: every cell starts as CellState.EMPTY.
Board() - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Board
 
BOARD_GAP - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Gap left empty between the two boards, along Z.
BOARD_SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Board size, reused from BoardView3D so both boards stay in sync with it.
boardGroup - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
BoardLabels3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
Builds the column-letter (A..J) and row-number (1..10) labels that sit just outside a board's two edges, like a spreadsheet's headers.
BoardLabels3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
 
BoardLabels3D.Board - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
Which board these labels are for -- picks which quad texture mapping to use.
BoardLabels3D.Layout - Record Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
Which edges the letters/numbers sit on, and which direction each one reads in.
BoardListener - Interface in com.example.battleship.model.board
Receives notifications about changes to a Board.
BoardListenerAdapter - Class in com.example.battleship.controller.event
No-op default implementation of the model's BoardListener, following the same Adapter pattern as ShipPlacementAdapter and CombatAdapter.
BoardListenerAdapter() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.event.BoardListenerAdapter
 
BoardView3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view
3D view of the 10x10 board.
BoardView3D(double, double) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Builds a single 10x10 board, its own fixed camera, lighting, and water grid, ready to have ships and shot marks added to it.
BRIDGE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
BRIDGE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
build(BoardLabels3D.Layout, BoardLabels3D.Board) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
Builds one full set of column-letter and row-number labels for a board, positioned in that board's own local 0..360 coordinates (relative to whatever group the caller adds the result to).
buildBowGun(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Small deck gun right at the bow, with a thin barrel pointing forward.
buildBowGun(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Forward deck gun, barrel pointing toward the bow tip.
buildBowPlanes(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
A pair of small bow planes (fins) sticking out of the hull near the bow.
buildBowPlank(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Thin overhang jutting out past the hull's front edge, just above the waterline.
buildBowPlank(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Thin overhang jutting out past the bow tip, just above the waterline.
buildBowSonarDome(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Small sonar dome bulging out at the very bow tip.
buildBridge(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Bridge with a single window band, centered on the ship.
buildBridge(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Bridge with a single window band.
buildCatapultStripes(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Two pale catapult stripes painted on the deck near the bow.
buildElevators(Group, double, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Two aircraft elevators: dark flat patches set into the deck on the side opposite the island.
buildFlagstaff(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Thin flagstaff at the stern, with a small flag.
buildFlagstaff(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Thin flagstaff near the stern, with a small flag.
buildFlame(double, double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
A small two-tone flame: a wider orange base sphere with a smaller yellow tip riding on top.
buildFlatQuad(double, double, float[]) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
A single flat rectangle (2 triangles, no thickness) lying in the X/Z plane.
buildFlatQuadForMachine(double, double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
Flat quad for the machine's board labels: the U (horizontal) axis flipped relative to the un-tuned starting mapping -- that starting version read mirrored left-right.
buildFlatQuadForPlayer(double, double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
Flat quad for the player's board labels: this texCoords mapping (both U and V flipped relative to the "obvious" one) is the confirmed-correct orientation for that board's position/camera angle.
buildFragment(WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
Builds one broken hull fragment from its WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec: sized, colored, positioned, and tipped over on two axes.
buildFunnel(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Funnel (smokestack) just aft of the bridge, with a darker rim on top.
buildFunnel(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Funnel (smokestack) just aft of the bridge, with a darker rim on top.
buildGunTubs(Group, double, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Small deck-edge anti-aircraft gun tubs near the bow and stern corners, glued to the deck's real edge.
buildHull() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
buildHull() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
buildHull() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
buildHull() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
buildHull() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
buildHullLayers(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Hull: 3 stacked layers, each WIDER than the one below -- narrow keel flaring outward toward the deck (a parabola that opens upward, not a pyramid).
buildIsland(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Off-center island (bridge, funnel, radar mast, flag), set aft of center toward starboard.
buildMast(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Mast with a yard (spanning the beam) and a small radar panel, rising from the bridge.
buildMast(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Mast with a yard (the cross shape) and a small radar panel, rising from the bridge.
buildPortholes(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
A row of small dark portholes along each side of the lower hull.
buildPortholes(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
A row of small dark portholes along each side of the lower hull, glued to its actual surface.
buildPortholes(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
A row of small dark portholes along each side of the hull, glued to its actual curved surface.
buildPressureHull(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Pressure hull: a row of tapered cylinders lying along X, forming the torpedo silhouette.
buildRingMesh(double, double, int) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
Builds a flat ring (an inner and outer circle of points, triangulated between them) lying in the X/Z plane.
buildSail(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Sail (conning tower), set slightly forward of center, with a window, periscope and radar.
buildSeaFloor(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
One big flat slab under both boards, standing in for the open sea around them.
buildSkyWalls(Group, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Four tall wall panels around the sea, standing in for a sky.
buildSmoke(double, double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
A thin dark sliver angled upward, standing in for a wisp of smoke.
buildSternCross(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Stern control surfaces: a plus-shaped cross of fins plus the propeller hub.
buildSternFlagstaff(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Thin flagstaff near the stern, with a small flag.
buildSternGun(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Aft deck gun, barrel pointing toward the stern.
buildSternOverhang(Group, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Small flat fantail ledge past the stern, matching a typical flat destroyer stern.
buildTaperedLayer(Group, double, double, double, double, Color, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Builds one full hull layer as 8 adjacent Box slices, each sized by AircraftCarrier3D.beamAtIndex(int, double, double).
buildTaperedLayer(Group, double, double, double, double, Color, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
Builds one vertical hull layer as a row of HULL_SLICES boxes along X, each wider (in Z, the beam) than the previous one -- a parabola (quadratic growth) from minBeam at the bow to maxBeam at the stern.
buildViews(Board) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.controller.FleetViewBuilder
 
buildWaterGrid() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Fills BoardView3D.root3D with one Water3D tile per cell of the 10x10 grid.
buildWaterGrid(Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
